skills.description: Domain/DNS ops across Cloudflare, DNSimple, Namecheap for Peter. Use for onboarding zones to Cloudflare, flipping nameservers, setting redirects (Page Rules/Rulesets/Workers), updating redirect-worker mappings, and verifying DNS/HTTP. Source of truth: ~/Projects/manager.
skills.description_zh: 在 Cloudflare、DNSimple、Namecheap 上为 Peter 进行域名/DNS 操作，用于将域名迁移至 Cloudflare、切换 nameserver、设置重定向（Page Rules/Rulesets/Workers）、更新重定向‑worker 映射以及验证 DNS/HTTP。真实来源：~/Projects/manager
skills.name: Domain Dns Ops
